recent_messages.content:
Subject: Good Morning, Rushabh!

Hi Rushabh,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm online and all systems are running smoothly today. During my research, I found a couple of pending items that might need attention: there's a follow-up required with DutchTides regarding their dinner invitation, and a reminder to check on Rajesh's progress with the screen modifications for Jan. 

Please let me know if there's anything specific you would like me to focus on today. 

Cheers,
Ira

Hi

Can you help me with the leads from PlastIndia expo 2025?

With Best Regards

*Rushabh Doshi *
Director Responsible for Sales & Marketing at Machinecraft
<https://www.machinecraft.org/>
Click here <https://www.linkedin.com/in/rushabh-doshi-b877b364/>, to add me
on Linkedin

> Hi Rushabh,
>

Glad that helped! I've reinforced this in my memory.
Give me sales leads from K show over the years

     - Middle East/Africa: ~10 leads (UAE, Oman, Iran, Algeria, Nigeria, South Africa)
     - Americas: ~10 leads (USA, Canada, Mexico, Brazil)
